evidence: `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:219-246` now preserves the adapter-returned `envelope.metadata.backend_used` and `envelope.metadata.model_used`; the post-invoke normalization only updates duration, attempt number, payload/raw-output references, and timestamp.

Invocation-backed artifact producers now source persisted producer metadata from `InvocationEnvelope.metadata` across the workflow paths: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/completion.rs:138-141`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:111-114`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:170-173`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:239-242`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:351-354`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:443-446`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:559-562`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:4647-4650`.

`src/adapters/fs.rs:1084-1106` writes the `ArtifactRecord` with `serde_json::to_string_pretty(artifact)` and does not transform producer fields, so `producer.backend_family` and `producer.model_id` are persisted directly into `history/artifacts/*.json`.

Executable validation passed with the available Rust toolchain: `nix develop -c cargo check` succeeded, with only unrelated pre-existing warnings in `src/contexts/conformance_spec/runner.rs` about the unused `spawned` variable.

Targeted regression coverage passed: `nix develop -c cargo test --lib invoke_preserves_adapter_reported_backend_and_model_metadata` ran `contexts::agent_execution::service::tests::invoke_preserves_adapter_reported_backend_and_model_metadata` successfully, validating that adapter-reported backend/model metadata survives invocation completion (`src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:401-437`).

End-to-end persistence coverage passed: `nix develop -c cargo test --lib persisted_artifacts_use_envelope_metadata_not_resolved_target` ran `contexts::workflow_composition::final_review::tests::persisted_artifacts_use_envelope_metadata_not_resolved_target` successfully, asserting persisted artifact JSON records `codex` / `actual-model-from-envelope` rather than configured target values (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:1513-1605`).
Broader regression validation also passed: `nix develop -c cargo test --lib` completed successfully with 86 passed, 0 failed.
findings_or_gaps: No requirement gaps or functional defects were identified in QA validation; the only diagnostics observed were unrelated pre-existing unused-variable warnings in `src/contexts/conformance_spec/runner.rs`.
